text.value: [ANGRY] Claire communicates the location of Mint’s hideout to V. She says she should go check it out and wishes her good luck...

[ANGRY] Claire answers about the data that V sent. She found some interesting info. Claire learns the owner is Mint. The name Mint rings a bell to Claire and ends up remembering that there was a great racer with a unique car with the name Mint. Claire finally founds an interesting information that could help V unlocking the Twintone. The Semimaru car is a custom car handmade by Mint and her friend so it’s not suppose to support this kind of technology but found that there is a location where the car has been updated multiple times. V could download Mint’s data to unlock it on the Semimaru.
[FRIENDLY] Claire communicates the location of Mint’s hideout to V. She says she should go check it out and wishes her good luck!

[FRIENDLY] Claire answers about the data that V sent. She found some interesting info. Claire learns the owner is Mint. The name Mint rings a bell to Claire and ends up remembering that there was a great racer with a unique car with the name Mint. Claire finally founds an interesting information that could help V unlocking the Twintone. The Semimaru car is a custom car handmade by Mint and her friend so it’s not suppose to support this kind of technology but found that there is a location where the car has been updated multiple times. V could download Mint’s data to unlock it on the Semimaru.
[ANGRY] Okay. V sends the data they got in the pevious quest to Claire and pays her for her help.
[FRIENDLY] Okay. V sends the data they got in the pevious quest to Claire.
[ANGRY] Claire comments the Semimaru is an awesome car. She says that she could help with that but needs V to send her the information they got about the car.
[FRIENDLY] Claire comments the Semimaru is an awesome car. She says that she could help with that but needs V to send her the information they got about the car.

[NEUTRAL] V asks Claire’s help as Claire knows a lot more about cars than V. V tells that she put her hands onto a new car, a Semimaru. The car is awesome but the Twintone feature is not working. Any idea why?
[NEUTRAL] V says that the Crystal Coat issue got fixed. She thanks Claire.
[FRIENDLY] Claire answers V and tells her to go have fun on the road!
[ANGRY] Claire answers V and tells her to go have fun on the road...
